file.name: App.jsx
file.description: Main orchestrator holding AnimatePresence and stacking all page sections.

file.name: index.css
file.description: Global styles, custom keyframes, font imports, and base Tailwind directives.

file.name: About.jsx
file.description: Introduction to the agency DNA. Features text reveals and parallax effects.

file.name: Clients.jsx
file.description: Displays client logos in two infinite, GPU-accelerated CSS marquees (national and international) moving in opposite directions.

file.name: Contact.jsx
file.description: Contact section split into agency details and a contact form with a modern layout.

file.name: Expertise.jsx
file.description: Grid of 3D tilt cards detailing high-level expertise areas (Strategy, Digital Design, Events/Scenography).

file.name: Footer.jsx
file.description: Modern footer with navigation links, branding, and copyright.

file.name: Header.jsx
file.description: Fixed top navigation bar with a glassmorphism backdrop and CTA button.

file.name: Hero.jsx
file.description: Full-screen auto-playing slider showcasing core business vertices with a Ken Burns background effect and thumbnail navigation.

file.name: Portfolio.jsx
file.description: Masonry layout grid displaying previous agency projects with hover interactions.

file.name: Process.jsx
file.description: Visual storytelling workflow explaining the agency's methodology and operational steps.

file.name: Services.jsx
file.description: Bento-box grid detailing granular services offered by the agency.

file.name: useScrollReveal.jsx
file.description: Custom React hook utilizing IntersectionObserver to trigger animations when elements become visible in the viewport.

directory.description: Stores static assets like hero slider images, stands photography, and noise textures.
